name: Fairies Praying To Heaven 2 ~ Great Devil's Return Match ~
short_description: Fairies Cirno and Daiyosei, alonge with the angel Milu set out once again to investigate the strange events in Gensokyo. Use Guardian Crystals to borrow ally abilities and defeat enemies along the way.
detailed_description:
=== Guardian Crystals ===

Fairies are not strong enough to handle all the problems on their path without help. Use Guardian Crystals to borrow the abilities of your companions. You can choose a crystal with the desired effect for each enemy and switch them without limitations, but you will need to spend TP to support the crystal effect.

If you use Guardian Crystals, at special moments an ability with a star ★ will appear, allowing you to trigger Crystal Release – a powerful ability that will deal massive damage or buff your companions.
It can become the key to victory.

=== Crafting items ===

You can gather materials for crafting. How? Explore levels, defeat enemies, or simply ask the fairies for them. Then, just create the items you need.
Improve your crafting skills, and you will be able to ease the effect of the Gimmicks. It’s fun.

=== Gimmicks ===

Over time, Gimmicks will appear that will spice up the battles.
In other words, they will enhance the abilities of enemies or weaken yours.
It’s up to you to decide which Gimmicks will have an effect, based on your equipment and skills.

=== Powerful Enemies ===

Some enemies cannot be defeated head-on.
You will need to skillfully combine Gimmicks, your abilities, Guardian Crystals, and weapons to win.
Don’t forget that you can create items with the help of the fairies.

※This game is a fan fiction of Touhou Project.
